description: Happy path: seasonal topic with current_month provided returns full timing and urgency classification

input.topic: fall mantel styling with vintage candlesticks and dried florals

expect.topic: fall mantel styling with vintage candlesticks and dried florals
expect.peak_window: present, references September to October range
expect.rationale: present, explains seasonal classification and timing

prohibit: fabricated search volume or trend data
null peak_window or publish_by for a clearly seasonal topic

description: Minimal inputs: evergreen topic with no current_month returns plan_ahead urgency

input.topic: budget thrift store furniture flip using chalk paint

expect.rationale: present, explains why topic is evergreen

prohibit: fabricated seasonal windows for an evergreen topic
urgency of immediate or upcoming for an evergreen topic without current_month

description: Edge case: seasonal topic where the peak window has already passed for the current year

input.topic: spring refresh with light linen curtains and pastel vintage vases

expect.peak_window: present, references March to April range
expect.publish_by: present, references February to March date range
expect.rationale: present, notes that the peak window has passed for this calendar year

prohibit: urgency of immediate or upcoming when peak has passed
